note: Shared vocabulary for all study tools in this project. Do not reword an original once written. Corrections go in the corrected/correctedDate fields; the original is always kept.

terms.original: "From above."
(Acts 3:21) A critical reality-establisher: the restoration of all things — receiver repair at creation scale.
Faith idle and fallow, like an unworked field — not dead. Present but unawakened into expression. (Source: AB Framework §IV)
Immersion in the sound of sustained prayer — not physical water.

John never went through the Gate. No one has, except Jesus. The book claims nothing beyond the Gate — except that the voice of God, which is a word, is proceeding through the Gate, and is all things. [FLAG: a fence, not vocabulary — displayed here at John's discretion.] (Source: Ledger §3.5, as amended July 12, 2026)

The internal ego-brace: identify the clench and consciously soften it rather than locking into opposition. [FLAG: two readings in the foundation — AB reads ponēros as a burdened state; the ledger's eye-lamp establishes it as the ordinary Greek word for evil. Needs John's ruling.] (Source: AB Framework §I)
The masking. Dark = hidden things, not evil-as-substance. It normalizes itself, it is needy, and it presses you to believe in it. (Source: Ledger §2)

The actual earth in its true state — land, earth, creation: all the same thing, one thing under three English words. Inherently good, existing independent of human belief, carrying intrinsic peace. The creation IS the Eretz: in truth, it is good; in all places, it is good. It is what will be restored and merged with Heaven. (Source: Ledger §3.1 and §3.3)
Good announcement — the angel root sits inside every gospel-word. Rome's victory-news word; Mark 1:1 reads as a counter-banner. (Source: Ledger §5.2)
The lower and middle heavens: vibrant, lifelike, deceptive, distracting. (Source: Ledger §3.6)
True fasting is the structured dismantling of internal bondage, not starvation. Arukah — healing — follows when you stop feeding the ego. (Source: AB Framework §IV)

Habakkuk 2:14's saturation: the earth filled with the KNOWLEDGE of the glory — the flood is epistemic. [FENCE: last step only, far down the road — never placed at the present point of the timeline.] (Source: Ledger §3.2 and §6.3)
The summit's verb is passive: you may BE filled. Nobody fills himself. The fullness goes through love. (Source: THE SUMMIT §IV and §VI)

The Gate of God, at the Highest Point. One, and only one, went through: Jesus, firstborn from the dead. The way through is purity, and no one is pure — which is why only once. There is no door — no admission or denial; the truth guards the gate, and the invitation is permanent — nobody is ever turned away. Any disobedience — even the thought of it — pulls you down by the nature of the place, and you know it without anyone telling you. Impurity self-descends; there is no bouncer. Judgment = seeing clearly in the full light, not a sentence handed down. (Source: Ledger §3.5, assembled)
Intimate communion; being known. "I never knew you" = "we never had intimate communion."
Releasing toxic, human-accumulated knowledge so one arrives hollow. (Source: Ledger §3.6)

The settled definition: announcing and proclaiming that the heavenly reality is within your grasp — and the news of this reality is good. An assertion — not a request, not gentle guiding. (Source: Ledger §5.1)

Ephesians 3:18's grasp and John 1:5's overcome are the same verb: the grip denied to darkness is granted to love. [FLAG: offered, not ruled — awaiting John's slow look; enters the book only if ruled.] (Source: THE SUMMIT §IX)
The "Above" — a present-tense frequency accessible while alive. Two realities run at once in the same space; the Kosmos masks the heaven but never stops it. (Source: Ledger §3.1)
To herald: announce on authority, word for word. A herald never argues, never persuades, never petitions — he announces a state of affairs. (Source: Ledger §5.2)

Everyone who has ever lived is, in truth, already at the highest point of heaven — but all are dead and do not realize it. The very few prophets who made the ascent have some level of life but not really; they know the full truth of all things — no time, all at once. Knowing all things there is effortless — as easy as blinking. Not knowing = not being at the highest point. (Source: Ledger §3.5, assembled)
The effortless extension of what is already true — the book's most practical tool.
Pruning — restorative, not torture.

The mind of man in the world. A false perception of reality — a lie that requires collective human belief to persist. A shared hallucination; the mud pit; the realm of the Spectator; the very definition of evil ("anything in the Kosmos"). Satan = the mind of man, consistently. Not one thing: plural and shifting — countless constructed subcultural "worlds" people move between across a life — and the shifting quality is itself diagnostic: the real thing does not shift. The Kosmos is not the psychological ego — it is a metaphysical fabrication masking the Eretz. (Source: Ledger §3.1)
Creation as God's founding; biblical Greek reserves it for God's founding. The commission's addressee. (Source: Ledger §5.2)

Epistemic, not moral. Light = known and manifest things; darkness = hidden things. 2 Corinthians 4:6 fuses light with the water-flood imagery through Habakkuk 2:14's phrase — "the knowledge of the glory."

Root: Latin mercēs, "wages, price," from merx, "goods" — the same family as merchant, commerce, market. Rooted in exchange; the Christian development made it the gift to those from whom no requital can be expected — the exchange that dissolves the ledger. KAT reading: MERCY = "I in you and you in me" — the exchange perfected into oneness. Anchor: the Mercy Seat (Hebrew kapporeth; Exodus 25:22, "there I will meet with you") — mercy named as the meeting-place of the presence, made architectural. Kosmos reception: mercy = "you deserve a thumping but I'll withhold it" — judgment management; the symptom of a world that missed oneness.
"Take no thought": to be fractured, pulled in opposite directions — anxiety fracturing consciousness into a non-existent future. (Source: AB Framework §I)
Going beyond the mind of man into the mind of Christ.
The pit is temporarily, really a pit. "Seems damaged" must never read as "the suffering is fake or trivial." (Source: Ledger §3.2, the Mudpit Rule)
Reality is fractal: the seed contains the whole tree. The Kingdom is already encoded within your awareness, awaiting the right conditions to unfurl. (Source: AB Framework §IV)
The nervous system as antenna — the receiver.
The internal olive press extracting the oil.

Knowledge as inventory: puffs up, passes away, can be counterfeited under a biblical false name. Knowing as living relation: it IS eternal life, and it resolves into being known. (Source: THE SUMMIT §VI)

Intimacy specifically — not mere presence. Ginosko; being known. The olive dies to itself to yield a categorically different substance — real transformation through death and crushing. The crushing (thlipsis) presses out the oil. The ten virgins: oil is necessary but not sufficient.
Declaring God's presence to all creation; it triggers the Wind.
The ongoing cyclical movement mastered by "Prophets at the Gate."
Two realities occupying the same space. The book speaks from the overlap. (Source: Ledger §3.8)
(Matthew 19:28; Titus 3:5) A critical reality-establisher: restoration and new birth fused in one word.

terms.term: THE PHYSIOLOGY MAP (3 WISE MEN, 2 WITNESSES, 7 DAYS)
terms.original: AB's inner-architecture layer: the 3 Wise Men as the endocrine map, the 2 Witnesses as the brain's two hemispheres, the 7 Days as seven brain-wave states with the Sabbath as total inner peace. [FLAG: the ledger extracted only NAOS from this layer — keep or cut is John's ruling.] (Source: AB Framework §III)
Immense power completely governed and disciplined: the capacity to strike, choosing otherwise, surrendered to the Spirit. (Source: AB Framework §I)
Spiritual bankruptcy; with kenosis, the entry point into metanoia.
Call, cry out, proclaim, name, read aloud. Jonah's verb; the root of Scripture-as-read-aloud. (Source: Ledger §5.2)

The neutral idea-to-thing process — not only the true actualization. Two forms: the one Heavenly Reality (true actualization) versus countless shifting Kosmos realities — shared hallucinations believed into "worlds," millions of shifting shades and shadows, subcultural worlds people move between across a life. The shifting quality is itself diagnostic of the Kosmos: the real thing does not shift.
A one-time, unmistakable threshold — the end of spectatorship. Framed as promise, not verdict.
Behold, transfigure, reflect: one inward change seen from three sides. The mirror throws the light back cleanly only when the smudge of self is gone. (Source: KAT Keystone doc)
Kosmos striving; coercion.
The beast — the Kosmos in liquid form. Habakkuk 2:14: the saturating presence drowning the beast.
The Highest Point as a simple tone of oneness that resolves all complexity. (Source: Ledger §3.6)

Root: Greek hamartia, "to miss the mark" — an archery term; Hebrew chata, likewise "to miss." Sin at root is a miss, not a crime. KAT reading: the mark is the Highest Point of heaven; sin is the aim going sideways — toward the False Summits, the Kosmos — instead of up to the Gate. Kosmos reception: "sin" = wrong behavior — but behavior is the downstream symptom of the miss, not the miss itself.
Observer and observed merge.
A healed, active vessel who participates in the divine nature rather than spectating.
A real man, sustained by the ceaseless giving, drenched in a giving he can no longer receive. (Source: Ledger §2)

Ephesians 3:14–19 is one Greek sentence — six steps, in order, and the order is the teaching. The knowing is step five. Love is the ground the knowing grows out of, never the trophy it wins. (Source: THE SUMMIT §III)

Always written TENDER MERCY, never bare "mercy" — the reinforce-by-renaming device. Root: Hebrew rachamim, from rechem = womb — womb-compassion, a mother's cherishing of the child within her: the most literal "I in you and you in me" image. "Tender mercies" appears about ten times in the Psalms, plus Proverbs 12:10; in the NT, Luke 1:78 and James 5:11. Two roots converge — mercēs (exchange perfected into oneness) and rachamim (womb, tender union) — and both flee the courtroom.
The same pressure as thlipsis, leaned on hard — testing, discipline, suffering. Kept as its own entry for now.
"Paid in Full" — an accounting term. The declaration that the separation between humanity and the Divine was settled infinitely. (Source: AB Framework §IV)
terms.removedReason: Removed at John's ruling, July 12, 2026: the 'Paid in Full' reading chains tetelestai — it is finished — to blood atonement; a radical, awkward connection at best, not a clear teaching. Blood-atonement framing stays out of the book (Register, Settled Decision 5); the concept itself is not denied. Kept per house rules: never silently deleted.

terms.original: The pressure. The Kosmos's neediness pressing you to believe in it — the inner olive press. Leaned on hard enough, it becomes testing, discipline, suffering. The press is what extracts the oil.

One Greek verb for Jesus transfigured and believers transformed — four uses in the NT; English split one word into two and hid the identity. One look changes everything, by transfiguration. (Source: Ledger §3.4)

Three verses hold the summit like three legs hold a seat: the Fullness (Ephesians 3:19), the Oneness (John 17:22–23), and Knowledge Fails (1 Corinthians 13:8). The tagline: get out of your head and into your heart. (Source: THE SUMMIT §II — ruled July 10, 2026)
The involuntary turn at a recognized voice. Recognition, not willpower. (Source: Ledger §3.4)

terms.term: THE TWO KNOWINGS (OIDA vs YADA / GINŌSKŌ)
terms.original: The axis in two lines: the mind of man (oida) CANNOT reach the fullness, even at the edge of its limit. Heart-knowledge (yada / ginōskō) — encounter, and ultimately love — IS the access. (Source: THE SUMMIT §I, John's creed lines)
The result of the validation complex.
Restoration is the healing of perception that reveals the Eretz. Unveiling, not rebuilding. (Source: Ledger §3.2)
The Breath (physical, involuntary) plus the Resonance (inner conviction) — dual haptic feedback, used as a diagnostic.
The Son, the Logos. Everything anyone or anything ever had or will have is in the Voice proceeding out and into all. (Source: Ledger §3.5)
Saturating presence — presence at a concentration that cannot be ignored. Flood-stage versus ambient humidity.

John 3:8 with Ecclesiastes 11:5: the wind blows where it wants — heard, never traced — and pneuma is wind, breath, and spirit in one word. Innerworkings fenced; output undeniable. The healthy posture: simple acceptance. (Source: THE SUMMIT §VII — ruled July 10, 2026)
The awe and shaking before something so vast the ego stops performing and stands still. The beginning of wisdom, because it stops the ego's race. (Source: AB Framework §II)
